items.title: Is Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) The Most Profitable Healthcare Stock To Buy?
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is among the most profitable healthcare stocks to buy. On January 22, TD Cowen lifted the price target on Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) to $250, up from $222, and maintained a Buy rating, citing the company’s fourth quarter results. The revised price target reflects an upside potential of approximately 14%. According […]

items.title: Jim Cramer GE Vernova Has “Visibility on the Earnings to the 2030s”
items.description: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) is one of the stocks that Jim Cramer shared takes on, along with navigating market shortages. Cramer highlighted the company’s long-term prospects, as he said: We’re a nation short on power, too. For years, our electricity barely grew, so power generation became a tough business, bad business. Biggest company, General Electric, […]
